---
title: "About"
---

This project builds a data lakehouse for French municipal and administrative
data , covering communes, departments, regions, population statistics, salary
data, ZIP codes, and municipal labels (flower cities, sports towns, etc.).

The pipeline follows a medallion architecture (bronze → silver → gold) using
DuckDB and dbt for transformations, MinIO for object storage, and Prefect for
orchestration. All metadata is tracked in PostgreSQL via a custom audit layer.

The source code and full README are on GitHub:
[github.com/enarroied/french_towns_lakehouse](https://github.com/enarroied/french_towns_lakehouse).

**Note:** Data insights on this blog are rendered locally and committed to the
repository. The local MinIO setup required to run the pipeline is not available
in the CI environment, so charts and figures are pre-computed.
